_comment: Single source of truth for scenario metadata. Used by mockup-hybrid.html for the detail page header. three-column.html still inlines its own copy; keep them in sync until the older page is migrated.

scenarios.label: Tiny house
scenarios.template: Can I build a tiny house on my lot. My property address is (x). What are the requirements?

scenarios.label: ADU setbacks
scenarios.template: What about an ADU? What are the setback requirements?

scenarios.label: Fence height
scenarios.template: What is the maximum fence height allowed on my property, for the front, back and side yard. Is there a setback requirement?

scenarios.label: Building records
scenarios.template: How do I request building records for a property?

scenarios.label: Pergola
scenarios.template: Can I put up a pergola? What are the requirements?

scenarios.label: Front porch extension
scenarios.template: Can I extend my front porch?

scenarios.label: Workshop / pole barn
scenarios.template: I want to build a workshop/small pole barn on my property in city limits. With a 40' span what is the maximum spacing between trusses?

scenarios.label: Lot division / condos
scenarios.template: Can my lot be divided and developed into condos?

scenarios.label: Cesspool / sewer
scenarios.template: If my cesspool fails, do I need to be connected to City sewer?

scenarios.label: Second driveway
scenarios.template: Can I add a second driveway to my property?

scenarios.label: Roof replacement permit
scenarios.template: Do I need a permit to replace the roof at my property?

scenarios.label: Finish basement
scenarios.template: What are the permit requirements for finishing my basement?

scenarios.label: A-board sign
scenarios.template: Can I put an "A" board outside of my business?

scenarios.label: Tree removal (front yard)
scenarios.template: Can I remove a tree in my front yard?
